description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Rin'wosho the Trader. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from Classic World of Warcraft.
name: Recipe: Mageblood Potion

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Mageblood Potion Item Level 55 Binds when picked up Requires Alchemy (275) Requires Zandalar Tribe - Revered Use: Teaches you how to make a Mageblood Potion. (3 Sec Cooldown) Max Stack: 20 Sell Price: 10 Requires Dreamfoil , Plaguebloom (2), Crystal Vial This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Rin'wosho the Trader.
